body:
Diego, thanks for the follow-up — I've had a chance to dig deeper into the [Solstice Grid](companies/solstice-grid) deck you flagged and I think you were right to flag it as worth a closer look. Their approach to distributed thermal storage is genuinely differentiated from what I've been seeing in the market, and the unit economics at the pilot site are surprisingly clean for this stage. I'm planning to get on a call with the founding team next week and would love to compare notes with you beforehand if you have 30 minutes — our thesis at [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) maps closely enough to this that I'd want to be thoughtful about where our diligence overlaps. Let me know what your schedule looks like toward the end of the week.

Amara
